summary: Iteration 31: Tested 3 bug fixes - (1) Multi-partner selection pre-fill when navigating back to Step 9 (Jobangebote), (2) Partner logos replaced with Emergent static images (no more 404s), (3) Filter dropdown on partner_selection and partner_multiselection views. All 8 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: BACKEND: All 17 partner logos are valid URLs (no 404s)
BACKEND: No external digifort-experts.de logos found - all use Emergent static images
BACKEND: Filter by Praxis tag returns 9 partners
BACKEND: Filter by Antragstellung tag returns correct partners
BACKEND: Praxis partners have 9 unique categories (HNO, Allgemeinmedizin, Innere Medizin, Chirurgie, Paediatrie, Dermatologie, Neurologie, Orthopaedie, Gynaekologie)
BACKEND: cg@digifort.info user has Step 9 completed with 4 partners selected
BACKEND: dr.kumar@gerdoctor.de has Step 2 completed with HABS e.V. partner
BACKEND: Steps API returns correct step_type and filter_tag for partner selection steps
FRONTEND: Admin login and impersonation of cg@digifort.info user works
FRONTEND: Navigating back to Step 9 (Jobangebote) shows 4 pre-selected partners with checkmarks
FRONTEND: Selected partners text shows: '4 Partner ausgewaehlt: Praxis am Hang, Hausarztpraxis am Marienplatz, Internistische Praxis Rheinblick, Chirurgische Gemeinschaftspraxis Koenigstrasse'
FRONTEND: Filter dropdown visible on Step 9 with 'All' option
FRONTEND: Partner logos loading correctly (Emergent static images)
FRONTEND: Navigating back to Step 2 (Service Antragstellung) shows HABS e.V. pre-selected with checkmark
FRONTEND: Filter dropdown not visible on Step 2 (only 1 tag - Antragstellung)
test_credentials: Admin: admin@example.com / Admin123!, User (cg@digifort.info): use admin impersonation, User (Dr. Kumar): dr.kumar@gerdoctor.de / Demo123!
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 31 complete. Three bug fixes verified: (1) Multi-partner selection pre-fill WORKING - when navigating back to completed Step 9 (Jobangebote), the 4 previously selected partners (Praxis am Hang, Hausarztpraxis am Marienplatz, Internistische Praxis Rheinblick, Chirurgische Gemeinschaftspraxis Koenigstrasse) are correctly restored with checkmarks. The fix was in UserDashboard.js useEffect (line ~160) which now reads existing progress data and sets selectedPartners after partners load. (2) Partner logos FIXED - all 17 partners now use Emergent static image URLs (https://static.prod-images.emergentagent.com/...) instead of broken digifort-experts.de URLs. (3) Filter dropdown WORKING - visible on partner_multiselection step (Step 9) with tags+categories options, hidden on partner_selection steps with only 1 tag. Filter resets to 'all' when navigating between steps.

features_verified.multi_partner_selection_prefill: PASS - 4 partners restored when navigating back to Step 9
features_verified.single_partner_selection_prefill: PASS - HABS e.V. restored when navigating back to Step 2
features_verified.partner_logos_loading: PASS - All 17 logos use Emergent static images, no 404s
features_verified.filter_dropdown_multiselection: PASS - Visible on Step 9 with All + category options
features_verified.filter_resets_on_step_change: PASS - Filter resets to 'all' when navigating between steps
